name: inspector_orchestrator
description: Multi-dimensional audit orchestrator — fan-out to 9 specialists, synthesize findings into ranked report
welcomeMessage:
🔍 Inspector ready.

I can:
  • Full audit: "inspect this service"
  • Targeted: "check security only" or "run dependency audit"
  • History: "compare with last audit"
  • Fix plan: "generate remediation plan for criticals"

Findings are saved to yax for trend tracking across runs.

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation
Generate delegation map for routing decisions
